risk_if_not_implemented: Without Remote Purging, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Centralized Management Of Mobile Devices
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to implement and govern Mobile Device Management (MDM) controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Centralized Management Of Mobile Devices (MDM-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Remote Purging (MDM-05) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Identity & Access Management (IAM)
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of identification and access management controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Identity & Access Management (IAM) (IAC-01) provides access control enforcement that compensates for the absence of Remote Purging (MDM-05) by restricting system and data access to authorized users through alternative identity and access mechanisms. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
